message:
refactor(providers): standardize API key error messages across all providers

Unify the error messages shown when a provider API key is missing to use
a consistent format:

  "Missing API key for provider. Configure credentials with /login
   <provider> or set the provider's API key env var."

Previously each provider had bespoke wording (e.g. "Missing API key for
Azure OpenAI. Set AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY or configure in settings.", etc.)
which was inconsistent and referenced different configuration paths. The
new message guides users to the /login command as the primary credential
flow while still mentioning the env var fallback.

Affected providers: azure-openai, cohere, gemini, openai, openai_responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
